raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Caltrans will develop a quick-build bike lane and intersection program to improve highway safety for bicyclists and pedestrians.",
    "Traffic violence involving cars, bicyclists, and pedestrians is rising at an alarming rate in California.",
    "Simple bikeway and intersection improvements can provide significant safety benefits.",
    "Traffic fatalities in California climbed to 4,285 in 2021, marking a 7.6% increase from 2020.",
    "There was a 6% increase in traffic fatalities in Los Angeles in 2022 from the previous year.",
    "Recent data by the City of San Francisco shows there were 42 traffic fatalities in 2024.",
    "Quick-build projects are interim capital infrastructure projects built with durable, low- to moderate-cost materials, lasting one to five years.",
    "Quick-build projects are intended to address safety needs immediately while allowing communities to test improvements before permanent construction."
  ]
}
```
